title: ADHES Butyl Tape Waterproof Tape Aluminum Foil Tape Sealan Tape,5cm x 5m,for RV Repair, Window, Silicone, Boat and Pipe Sealing, Glass & EDPM Rubber Roof Patching, Silver (5cm x 5m)
features: 【Multi-Use Waterproof Repair Tape】Multi-Use Repair for roof leaks, window sealing, rv awning, gutters, down spouts, boats, personal watercrafts, canoes, outdoor equipment, mobile homes, RV'S & campers, PVC & plumbing pipes, sprinkler systems, doors, walls, seams, vents, air ducts, HVAC systems, DIY projects, EPDM Rubber Roof Patching, etc.

【Safety and High Durability Sealant Tape】ADHES Butyl Tape was made of pure butyl rubber with upgraded aluminum foil cover, thicker and heavier than similar products, stronger adhesive,toxic-free,safe and tasteless,waterproof, UV resistant, vapor prevent, anti-aging and odorless; provides a better sealing result and longer service time

【High Environmental Adaptability】AHDES butyl tape aluminium foil tape is adapt to most kinds of weather. Work well on metal, tiles, shingle, aluminum, galvanized steel, gypsum board, wood, fiberglass, brick, concrete and etc. Your ideal tool for Home, Auto, Outdoors and etc.

【Easy To Use】The waterproof butyl tape is easy to operate. Clean the aim surface and cut the suitable tape size. Stick the aluminum foil adhesive tape on it and press the tape, no other tools requirement in the whole process.
【Trusted Brand 】ADHES design, develop, and manufacture, and we strive to do our best for providing better and better products to all the world. Choose ADHES!
description: Product Description Unmatched Weatherproofing for All Seasons Quick and Easy Installation in Under a Minute All-Purpose Butyl Tape: From Home Repairs to Industrial Uses Related Item butyl tape Add To Basket butyl tape Add To Basket butyl tape Add To Basket butyl tape Add To Basket butyl tape Add To Basket butyl tape Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 532 4.1 out of 5 stars 532 4.2 out of 5 stars 133 4.2 out of 5 stars 133 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,550 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,550 Price £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £9.89 £ 9 . 89 £25.99 £ 25 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £15.59 £ 15 . 59 Quantity of Pack 1 1 1 1 1 1 Size 50MM x 5m 100MM x 5m 50MM x 5m 200MM x 5m 50MM x 5m 100MM x 5m Waterproof ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Super-sealed ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Tear-resistant ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Essential Winter Tips for Using Butyl Tape Like a Pro Warm the Surface For the best adhesion, ensure the surface you're applying the tape to is dry and slightly warm. Use a heat gun or hairdryer to gently warm the area if it's freezing outside. Keep Surfaces Dry Cold weather often brings moisture and frost—ensure the surface is completely dry for optimal adhesion. Apply Pressure Cold temperatures may reduce initial stickiness. Press firmly and evenly across the tape to ensure a strong bond. Plan Repairs for Dry Weather Whenever possible, schedule outdoor repairs on dry, sunny days to avoid rain or snow interference.
